hero_subtitle: A Passionate Fullstack Web Developer from Indonesia. I enjoy learning new things — especially in programming, web development, and geospatial technology.

about_subtitle: A little more about my journey, my skills, and what I'm passionate about.
about_desc_first_part: As a developer based in Indonesia, I'm driven by a passion for exploring the ever-evolving worlds of programming and web technology. I have a particular interest in the geospatial domain, and my work is currently centered on building web-based GIS solutions.
about_desc_second_part: My professional philosophy is built on three pillars: consistency, a curious mind, and a commitment to sharing knowledge. This approach is fundamental to growth in tech, motivating me to dive into new tools and share what I learn with the community.
contact_page_subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your visions.

about_philosophy_efficiency_desc: Building systems that are fast, lean, and optimized for performance.
about_philosophy_scalability_desc: Designing architectures that grow alongside your business and user base.
about_philosophy_aesthetics_desc: Combining functionality with clean, modern, and intuitive design.
about_fun_facts_coffee: Fueled by caffeine, assembled with logic.
about_fun_facts_gaming: Virtual world explorer, digital world architect.
about_fun_facts_music: Finding the rhythm in code through Deep House.
about_fun_facts_learning: Forever a student in the art of the craft.
about_fun_facts_desc_long: More than just lines of code and GIS coordinates, there is an infinite curiosity that underlies every project I work on.
skill_playground_desc: The architectural components I use to transform ideas into scalable solutions. Review my technical stack directly or experiment with the interactive simulator on the side.
skill_playground_strategy_desc: Every technology is chosen not for its popularity, but for its effectiveness in solving specific business problems.
